title: Father, Son and Holy Ghost
publicDomainBasis: Charles Wesley (1707–1788), Conrad Kocher (1786–1872). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Father, Son and Holy Ghost,
One in Three, and Three in One,
As by the celestial host,
Let Thy will on earth be done;
Praise by all to Thee be giv’n,
Glorious Lord of earth and heav’n!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Vilest of the sinful race,
Lo, I answer to Thy call:
Meanest vessel of Thy grace,
Grace divinely free for all;
Lo, I come to do Thy will,
All Thy counsel to fulfil.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
If so poor a worm as I,
May to Thy great glory live,
All my actions sanctify,
All my words and thoughts receive;
Claim me for Thy service, claim
All I have, and all I am.

sections.label: Verse 4
Verse 5
